name: Siavash Razmi
headline: Researching AI-based anomaly detection and root cause analysis for cloud and distributed systems at the University of Innsbruck.
bio: I am a PhD Candidate in Computer Science at the University of Innsbruck, working in the Distributed and Parallel Systems Group under the supervision of Dr. Thomas Fahringer. My current research focuses on anomaly detection and root cause analysis systems using AI methods for cloud, distributed, and parallel computing environments. My broader work spans machine learning, cloud and network systems, data analytics, AI-driven O-RAN spectrum management, and adaptive models for cryptocurrency market behavior. Previously, I completed an MSc in Artificial Intelligence at the University of Tehran, where my thesis focused on directional-change forecasting and lead-lag relationships for algorithmic trading.
contactNote: For research collaboration, applied AI work, or academic inquiries, email is the best first contact.

research.title: AI for Cloud Reliability
research.description: Anomaly detection and root cause analysis for cloud, distributed, and parallel systems using machine learning and AI methods.

research.title: AI for Network Management
research.description: Adaptive spatio-temporal spectrum management with discriminative and generative AI.

research.title: Financial Machine Learning
research.description: Directional-change modeling, meta-learning, lead-lag structure, and regime-aware crypto strategies.

experience.description: Current LinkedIn-listed professional role, focused on applied AI and machine learning work alongside PhD research.

experience.organization: Distributed and Parallel Systems Group, University of Innsbruck
experience.description: Working under the supervision of Dr. Thomas Fahringer on AI-based anomaly detection and root cause analysis systems for cloud, distributed, and parallel computing environments.
Implemented a thesis-derived trading strategy in live cryptocurrency futures markets using Django, Redis, and PostgreSQL; refined the trading universe and rules to improve risk-adjusted performance.

experience.organization: Social Network Laboratory, University of Tehran
experience.description: Developed machine-learning-driven algorithmic trading research using LightGBM, time-series forecasting, and data analysis under the supervision of Dr. Masoud Asadpour and Dr. Sasan Barak.
Built PyTorch models for stock market price movement prediction, trading strategy design, and limit-order-book and market-by-order data analysis.
Maintained Microsoft Active Directory, DNS, DHCP, Kerio firewall, office automation tools, and Mikrotik routing infrastructure.

education.description: Distributed and Parallel Systems Group. Research focus: AI-based anomaly detection, root cause analysis, cloud computing, distributed systems, and parallel systems.
Thesis: Algorithmic Trading Using Directional-change Forecasting and Identifying Lead-lag Relations. GPA: 4.0 / 19.05 of 20.
Graduated with a GPA of 3.22 / 16.1 of 20.

publications.title: State-Dependent Market (In)Efficiency in Cryptocurrency Markets
publications.authors: Sasan Barak, Siavash Razmi, Alireza Mousavi
publications.description: Studies whether cryptocurrency market inefficiency is regime-dependent using adaptive learning from on-chain and trend-based information.

publications.title: Highly Dynamic and Flexible Spatio-Temporal Spectrum Management with AI-Driven O-RAN: A Multi-Granularity Marketplace Framework
publications.authors: Mehdi Rasti, Elaheh Ataeebojd, Shiva Kazemi Taskooh, Mehdi Monemi, Siavash Razmi, Matti Latva-aho
publications.description: Proposes adaptive AI-driven spectrum sharing for O-RAN with multi-timescale and multi-granularity allocation.

publications.title: Adaptive Crypto Trading Using Directional Change and Meta-Learning
publications.description: Introduces a directional-change strategy with meta-learning for adaptive hyperparameter selection across market regimes.

projects.title: DeepLOB on Binance Perpetual Market Data
projects.description: Training and evaluating DeepLOB-style models on cryptocurrency futures order book data.

projects.title: Reinforcement Learning Trading Bot
projects.description: Designed reinforcement-learning-based trading agents and backtests for crypto market environments.

projects.title: Persian Text-to-Speech and Summarization
projects.description: Fine-tuned SpeechT5 over Common Voice and stablelm-3b over TweetSumm for Persian-language AI tasks.

projects.title: Network Analysis of Persian Twitter
projects.description: Analyzed tweet interaction networks using PageRank, Louvain community detection, and betweenness centrality.

projects.title: Robot Localization and Mapping
projects.description: Implemented probabilistic localization and mapping workflows in robotics simulations.

projects.title: Geospatial and Business Data Analysis
projects.description: Mapped Iranian geospatial data and analyzed online Persian travel service pricing through web crawling.
